name: team_task_update_context
description: Update an existing context source on a task by its index in the context_sources array. Use this to correct or refresh context data, such as updating a GitHub reference after an issue is modified or refreshing Slack thread context with new messages.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task whose context to update

context_index.description: Zero-based index of the context source to update in the task's context_sources array

context_type.description: Updated type of the context source

context_data.description: Updated source-specific data payload replacing the existing context data

examples.name: Update a GitHub context with new issue state

context_data.title: Login fails with expired refresh token

examples.name: Update a Slack context with additional thread replies

context_data.summary: Updated: team agreed on OAuth 2.0 PKCE flow for mobile clients
